nasb.text: But we are not of those who shrink back to destruction, but of those who have faith to the preserving of the soul.

esv.text: But we are not of those who shrink back and are destroyed, but of those who have faith and preserve their souls.

cnv.text: 但我們不是那些後退以致滅亡的人，而是有信心以致保全生命的人。

ccb.text: 但我们都不是退后走向灭亡的人，而是因为有信心而灵魂得救的人。

csbs.text: 然而，我们不是退缩以致灭亡的人，而是有信仰以致保全灵魂的人。
